next_steps: Perform an orbital tissue biopsy for histopathology and IgG4 immunostaining
Initiate systemic corticosteroids for symptomatic relief and vision protection
Consult rheumatology for systemic evaluation and management
Order a comprehensive rheumatologic work-up including ANA, ENA panel, ANCA, and anti-dsDNA
Monitor intraocular pressure and optic nerve function closely
Consider PET-CT to evaluate for systemic IgG4-related disease or occult malignancy
